steps.title: Substitute w = 10 into the equation
steps.content:
The equation $d = 33w + 100$ gives total savings $d$ after $w$ weeks. To find the total savings in 10 weeks, we substitute $w = 10$:
$$d = 33(10) + 100$$

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content:
Evaluate the expression:
$$d = 330 + 100 = 430$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
